SCALP_STOP_ATR_MULTIPLIER.reason: tighten stops when WR low; widen when WR strong

SCALP_TP_ATR_MULTIPLIER.reason: increase targets when WR strong; reduce when WR weak

SCAN_INTERVAL_SECONDS.reason: reduce frequency when WR low; increase when WR strong

MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD.reason: reduce size when WR poor; increase when WR strong

MAX_RISK_PER_TRADE_USD.reason: tighten per-trade risk when WR low; relax slightly when WR strong

CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD.reason: raise entry bar when WR low; lower when WR strong
